text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)
It's like I try to make KDE have mac style layout, where you have a top Global menu + spacer + all other stuff clocks etc.

then it will crash once you add the spacer.

I had the FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20210218-fa3bd463cee-256776 with the latest KDE avilable.

The bug report looks the same to me.

Thank you very much.
